user.title: Add XEWE Dock
user.description: Enter the IP address shown by the device on your network.

pair.title: Pair XEWE Dock
pair.description: Enter the PIN shown by the device at {host}. Home Assistant will send the MQTT broker credentials to the device automatically. Override the broker address only if the device cannot reach it.

error.invalid_pin: The PIN was rejected by the device. Check the PIN and that the device is still in pairing mode.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device to provision it.
error.no_broker: Could not determine a broker address reachable by the device. Enter one manually.

abort.no_mac: The device did not advertise a MAC address and cannot be identified.
abort.mqtt_not_configured: The MQTT integration is not set up. Install the Mosquitto broker add-on and add the MQTT integration, then try again.

mqtt_not_configured.title: XEWE LED-OS requires MQTT
mqtt_not_configured.description: XEWE LED-OS needs the MQTT integration. Install the Mosquitto broker add-on and add the MQTT integration, then reload XEWE LED-OS.
